objective: Add spawn/kill buttons to topology UI. Subprocess lifecycle managed by topology-ui process. All actions emit spans.
in_scope: POST /api/nodes/spawn { node_type } → forks subprocess; subprocess inherits OTLP env
DELETE /api/nodes/{endpoint_id} → terminates subprocess (SIGTERM, then SIGKILL after 5s)
exit_criteria: Click spawn-gateway in UI: blue node appears in graph within 5s
Click kill on any node: disappears within 10s
Subprocess spans rafka.ui.subprocess.spawned / .killed visible in Jaeger
Spawned subprocess's own boot-span chain visible in Jaeger (verifies OTLP env propagation)
Jaeger URL covering a spawn → boot → discovered chain
